programme.title: Journey To Dream
programme.desc: Journey to Dream is an info-ed program that takes audiences into the world of new energy vehicles. Follow Michelle Chia as she meets the dream makers of BYD, uncovering the science and innovation behind the safety, reliability, and performance of these next-generation vehicles.

programme.title: Fire Country S1
programme.desc: The station 42 and Three Rock crews are called to a backfire started by a private firefighting company to protect a high-end winery but instead threatens to grow out of control.

programme.title: Wheel Of Fortune S42
programme.desc: Ryan Seacrest takes over as the new host for the well-loved gameshow.

programme.title: Animal Impossible
programme.desc: Tim Warwood and Adam Gendle risk life and limb to uncover the truth about animals in this eye-opening and entertaining series. Do cats always land on their feet? Could a squid sink a ship? Is spider silk really stronger than steel? The intrepid pair quiz experts and conduct audacious stunts - including a nerve-wracking swim with a great white shark - to get answers. But they find more than they expected, discovering a whole host of strange and remarkable truths about the animal kingdom.

programme.title: The Chase S16
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh and his criminally clever Chaser are back for yet another battle of the brains - can our contestants beat the Chaser, or will it be just another day at the office?

programme.title: Arts 21
programme.desc: ARTS 21 is an arts magazine show focusing on the latest news and events on the culture scene.

programme.title: The Chefs' Line - Series 1
programme.desc: Every top restaurant has a line of chefs leading to the top, from the Commis chef to the Head chef. This celebratory cooking competition pitches at-home cooking enthusiasts against professionals, starting at the bottom and working their way up. Can they beat their way to the top of The Chef's Line?

programme.title: Lion Mums S4
programme.desc: KP Ho begins a final, no-holds barred onslaught against Grace and Durrani, who must decide what they're willing to sacrifice in order to win. In the Lian household, Margaret seeks to repair her relationship with Lucas, while Chae helps Hillary manage her examination stress. Kai's friendship with the bad boys causes him to devise an alarming plan. An unwilling Miss Sim pushes Amos hard before his PSLE, ultimately driving him to make a disastrous choice.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! Duel Monsters
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! follows the adventures of high school student Yugi, who has a magical secret that comes to life when he plays his favorite card game.

programme.title: Bakugan 3.1
programme.desc: The Bakugan brawlers are back with new Bakugan buddies! Watch out for an all new origin story.

programme.title: Super BOOMi S2
programme.desc: (Dual Language English and Mandarin) Super BOOMi follows an animated bear and his friends as they learn and play in a virtual reality game universe.

programme.title: Blippi Visits
programme.desc: Come explore the world with Blippi! There are so many exciting things to explore and learn. Feed your kids' curiosity while they learn about vehicles, animals, the natural world and so much more.

programme.title: Ollie And Friends S6
programme.desc: Ollipolis is having a Halloween Harvest festival. To win Best Pumpkin, Ollie and friends try and grow their own. The Imp, unable to grow his own prize-winning produce, ventures to steal theirs. Sloppy manages to misplace his toolbelt amidst an Invent-o-thon. In order to find the missing toolbelt, Ollie and friends will need to find a way to clear up the workshop.

programme.title: Pinkfong Songs & Stories
programme.desc: Join Pinkfong and friends for more fun and adventure.

programme.title: Pocoyo S1
programme.desc: (Dual Language English and Chinese) Pocoyo is a curious, fun-loving, friendly toddler who's always into something new whether he's on a quest with his friends in outer space or just cleaning up his blocks, every day is an adventure.

programme.title: Go Jetters: Sr2
programme.desc: The series has lots more of the comedy, teamwork, great gadgets (including a brand new vehicle), awesome sights and funky facts about amazing landmarks that young viewers and their parents have come to love. Travelling the world with their teacher, mentor and friend Ubercorn, a disco-grooving unicorn, the Go Jetters are fixing the mishaps caused by the mischievous meddlings of Grandmaster Glitch in new locations including Central Park in New York, Machu Picchu, China, Japan, Mali, and Petra.

programme.title: Super Rover & Friends
programme.desc: Sloppy is drawing weird things today because he did not enough sleep the night before. Can our heroes help him by exploring the story of Princess and the Pea? Meanwhile, Vicky is out of business after rumors go around that her new fruit juice will make you sleep-less.

programme.title: Lupin's Tales S1
programme.desc: Lupin dreams of being like the storybook heroes he admires, and goes from one tale to the next to live out their adventures. But the impetuous wolf-cub is far from perfect, and it's not easy getting to that "happy ending"! Luckily, he can count on the Narrator's help to learn from his mistakes.

programme.title: Moka's Fabulous Adventures
programme.desc: Moka, the King of the Savannah's son, a naive and reckless little crocodile, leaves home one day to go explore his vast kingdom. Cherry, a brave rhinoceros from the Royal Guard is sent along to insure his protection. But much to her despair, Moka's insatiable curiosity and impulsive behavior are constantly getting them into trouble!

programme.title: Jade Armor
programme.desc: The martial arts-loving Lan Jun, an unlikely teenage heroine who must learn the ancient secrets of her family and uncover the unexpected, all while navigating life as a teen.

programme.title: Shasha and Milo
programme.desc: Shasha and Milo are the newly activated Crescent Island Guardians. Imbued with the power to transform between human, cat and a formidable hybrid form, Shasha and Milo are tasked with protecting Crescent Island from the ridiculous plots of our fearsome villainous cat, Luca. However, they must try to strike a balance between their daily lives as ordinary middle school students and their fate of transforming into heroes!

programme.title: Pokemon Ultimate Journeys: The Series
programme.desc: The stakes are higher than ever for Ash, Goh, and Chloe as they advance toward their goals! As the Pokmon World Coronation Series tournament heats up, intensive training is in store for Ash, Pikachu, and their Pokmon friends.

programme.title: Wheel Of Fortune S42
programme.desc: Ryan Seacrest takes over as the new host for the well-loved gameshow.

programme.title: Aunty Lee's Deadly Delights
programme.desc: Branded first a thief and now a murderer, Pat panics and tries to flee from the police — dragging Aunty Lee into the chaos as she races to uncover the truth before it's too late.

programme.title: Kin
programme.desc: Louis confronts James for getting a business associate to endorse him on social media. Derek intervenes when he hears that May Wan is seriously considering selling Boss Lady Tau Huay. Razali brushes off Zara's complaints about not feeling well, resulting in dire consequences.

programme.title: Lion Mums S4
programme.desc: With days to go until PSLE, Grace is forced to deal with a police investigation when the fire is deemed suspicious. Eager to impress his friends, Kai pushes on with his dangerous plan. Min Yi decides it's time for some tough love and finds herself makingan unbearable sacrifice. Meanwhile, things are unravelling fast for Mrs Wang and Ms Sim.

programme.title: Aunty Lee's Deadly Delights
programme.desc: When a treasured family heirloom goes missing and a domestic helper is accused of theft, Aunty Lee steps in to sniff out the truth — just as Cherril reels from the shock of Noel tumbling into yet another sex scandal.

programme.title: Border Security: America's Front Line S2
programme.desc: Constantly on the lookout for weapons, illegal travellers, and contraband, Border Security: America's Front Line follows the work of US Customs and Border Protection agents and officers as they screen travellers, inspect cargo, and secure the longest border in the world.

programme.title: Hoarders S13
programme.desc: A reality-TV show that features compulsive hoarders--people who are addicted to filling their homes with objects--and how that spills out into their lives.

programme.desc: Lim Shi-An, a young freelance graphic designer steps back in time to design a vintage and hyperlocal life-sized advertisement poster for Singaporean bag brand, Tocco Toscano.

programme.title: Emerald
programme.desc: Emerald is learning how to be a mermaid princess, but she doesn't feel like one at all. She's not very good at waving to crowds and royal headdresses just aren't her thing - her hair is too spiky and wild. In a universe that celebrates the natural world and the joy of creativity, Emerald will come to understand she can learn to do things her own way!

programme.title: Kin
programme.desc: The death of her baby forces Zara to face the truth about Razali. Handsome tries to prove that he is able to run Boss Lady. Nikky bonds with Maxine when she helps him with his homework.

programme.title: Lion Mums S4
programme.desc: The Lion Mums race to get their kids ready for the Big Day, and save their friend from a dire fate. Grace gets a grilling from the panel of inquiry, and is left with an agonising decision. Mrs Wang is flailing and out of options for Amos, when she gets a merciful reprieve she never could have expected. Kai takes a big risk to make things right, and the Lion kids pull together for the biggest examinations of their young lives.

programme.title: Hollywood Squares S1
programme.desc: A reboot of the classic game show, where celebrities face contestants seated at desks arranged vertically. Contestants judge the celebrities' responses to questions to determine winners.

programme.title: Shanghai
programme.desc: A '40s period piece which revolves around an American expat who returns to Shanghai in the months before Pearl Harbor due to the death of his friend.

programme.title: Escape From Pretoria
programme.desc: Based on the real-life prison break of two political captives, Escape From Pretoria is a race-against-time thriller set in the tumultuous apartheid days of South Africa.

programme.title: Glastonbury 2024
programme.desc: Chris Martin's band make musical history by headlining at the Pyramid Stage a record-breaking five times. Grammy award-winning singer Dua Lipa also graces the Pyramid Stage – seven years after her festival debut – while country-pop crossover singer Shania Twain follows in the footsteps of Diana Ross, Dolly Parton and Kylie Minogue by taking the coveted Sunday afternoon legend' slot.

programme.title: 锦月如歌

programme.title: 他乡的煮人
programme.desc: 他乡的煮人将通过发掘各人的奋斗经历美食背后的故事以及烹调上精益求精的匠人精神加深观众对香港美食的认知不同年代皆有香港厨师凭借自身实力于世界各地一展所长落地生根节目将展现他们如何坚持香港饮食文化的传承创新融合三大原则将独一无二的香港美食立足他乡成就一个个动人的香港煮人故事.

programme.title: 敦煌千年不散的宴席
programme.desc: 中华民族之所以五千年生生不息绵延不绝就是因为我们的语言文字风俗饮食都是千年传承从来没有中断观众发现以往秦川安秋导演创作的敦煌纪录片都承载了非常厚重的历史文化信息这次的美食片却大不一样从主题定位人物故事叙事方式等都有了非常大的改变叙述风格也生动活泼了很多让观众看到了更多的人间烟火一种田园诗般的美该片通过将敦煌壁画饮食文化呈现出来并将当下敦煌百姓的生活状态一日三餐加工食物的过程忠实记录下来以展现敦煌饮食文化的传承与发展.

programme.title: 锦月如歌

As Dwita, Greg and Deby embark on this unexpected journey together, a series of challenges and complications arise, turning Dwita's life upside down.

programme.title: Jalan Ampas
programme.desc: Jalan Ampas is a drama of two parellel storylines - one a period drama and the other an investigative melodrama set in the present.

programme.title: Rahasia Dan Cinta
programme.desc: Dwita, the daughter of a prominent entrepreneur finds herself caught in an arranged marriage with Greg - a match orchestrated by their fathers to merge their companies. Aware that Dwita would likely resist this plan, her father assigns her a personal bodyguard, Debu, to keep her in line. As Dwita, Greg and Deby embark on this unexpected journey together, a series of challenges and complications arise, turning Dwita's life upside down.

programme.title: Detik Semasa
programme.desc: The program analyses and dissect issues of concern to the Malay/Muslim Singaporeans - be it at the community level, national, regional or global. Apart from raising awareness, each DETIK episode hopes to set viewers thinking and make informed decisions on matters that can impact their lives.

programme.title: Kanvas Harapan
programme.desc: Ramli Abdullah overcame a troubled childhood marked by drugs and violence to become a respected member of society. He now uses his experiences to inspire and motivate others as a senior operation officer and motivational speaker. Through his NGO, Reforming Support Group, he helps ex-offenders turn their lives around and find redemption. His message is to "Never give up and believe in change", which represents his journey of vindication and hope.

programme.title: Remuk
programme.desc: Idris discovers Jamilah is a victim of domestic abuse, while Malik grows distant and lashes out at Ziana over Idris and his condition. Liza faces public scrutiny and finds closure after revealing her miscarriage. Khairul begins healing, and Melissa struggles with homelessness and sobriety.

programme.title: Papa Ricky
programme.desc: As Riqmal prepares to take Alisya home from the beach, Zara threatens to reveal a shocking truth to her. Meanwhile, Nurin goes to Puan Ida's house in search of Zara, unaware of the tension that awaits her.

programme.title: Ultraman Omega
programme.desc: There are many universes, they may be similar, but they have their own characteristics, as in the case of Omegaverse. A universe that's similar to the original Ultra universe, but has its own ultras. Omega is a Space Garrison rookie who was sent to Earth on a mission to protect it from monsters that appear mysteriously.

programme.title: Aroma Puncak Borneo S1
programme.desc: The journey of a nomad to the peaks of the highlands in Borneo. Exploring gastronomy and cuisine while getting to know the customs and cultures of various ethnic groups on the Land of the Hornbills.

programme.title: Bunga Salju
programme.desc: Qaisara files a police report accusing Farouk of attacking Azizi and running scams, leading to his arrest. However, through his lawyer, he manipulates Azizi and Fatimah to secure his release, while Zul's search for his sister reaches a dead end.

programme.title: From KL to PL
programme.desc: 4 personalities from 4 different backgrounds embark on a journey in the United Kingdom on a mission to explore the Premier League's leading stadiums. A vacation that is supposed to be fun but there are tasks that need to be completed.

programme.title: Remuk
programme.desc: Idris struggles with feelings for Ziana while trying to rekindle his bond with Jamilah, leading to a confrontation with her husband. programme.title: Unexpectedly Yours
programme.desc: Iqi urges Alani to stand up for the person she loves. Meanwhile, Kerol struggles to forget Alani and attempts to move on with his life. Despite the challenges around them, can they find their way back to each other?

programme.title: Pinjaman Syurga
programme.desc: Natasha and Taufik get married after graduating and build a good life with their son, Haikal. Both of them get promoted at work, giving them a stable income. But their lives change when people around them start noticing that Haikal is different from other children.

programme.title: Pinjaman Syurga
programme.desc: Taufik and Natasha's marriage worsens when Taufik begins neglecting Natasha and Haikal after learning the truth about their son. Meanwhile, Natasha learns to accept Haikal and takes steps to support him.

programme.title: Pinjaman Syurga
programme.desc: Taufik divorces Natasha, leaving her life in turmoil. Now, she must care for Haikal with the support of her family and former sister-in-law.

programme.title: Pinjaman Syurga
programme.desc: Taufik moves forward with his life and remarries, while Natasha hesitates to move on after receiving a proposal from Zainal.

programme.title: Pinjaman Syurga
programme.desc: Elisya's difficulty in getting along with Zafira, coupled with Taufik's thoughts about Haikel, puts a strain on her marriage with him. Meanwhile, after much contemplation, Natasha accepts Zainal's proposal, much to his delight.

programme.title: Pinjaman Syurga
programme.desc: Zainal struggles to move on after his brother's passing, creating tension within his family. As they weather the storm, Natasha bears the brunt of his outbursts, and even her son isn't spared. Will this push them to the breaking point?

programme.title: Pinjaman Syurga
programme.desc: Taufik hopes to reconnect with Haikel but struggles to gain his attention. His behaviour leaves his family and Natasha feeling uneasy.

programme.title: Pinjaman Syurga

programme.desc: This story centers on Zakaria, a nine-year-old boy living in poverty with his autistic mother and grandmother. When Maryam accidentally breaks his mother's cherished radio, causing her emotional distress, Zakaria is determined to make things right.

programme.title: Tiang Lampu
programme.desc: Ashraf feels he's being cheated because Nadia didn't tell him about JP. Mazlan is trying to hide from Zainab that he got to know a lady cyclist. A server breakdown in Big Buzz leads to an unexpected discovery for the whole office.

programme.title: Tiang Lampu
programme.desc: Ashraf promises to Nadia that he will fix the damage that he had caused. Bob tries to convince Sally that the time is now to have children. programme.title: Terpaling Drama

programme.desc: Nadia introduces her bridesmaids to Ashraf and in come Jen, Nadia's cousin. The one who Ashraf ghosted 16 years ago. programme.title: Tiang Lampu
programme.desc: Martha tries to convince J.P not to get married to Nadia. Zainab follows Mazlan discreetly and find out the truth. programme.title: Tiang Lampu
programme.desc: Bob is oblivious that J.P is sending him to Bangkok for an urgent client presentation. Zainab met her ex crush back in secondary school, Zack, and got smitten by him. J.P is asking for Ashraf's help as he loses his card. Jen organised a Bachelorette Party and discovers that Nadia might have feelings towards Ashraf. J.P came back home and someone from the past is waiting for him, Sherilyn!

programme.title: Tiang Lampu
programme.desc: It's the eve of the wedding and the caterer goes missing! Not just the caterer but J.P goes missing as well and Ashraf feels he knows why. programme.title: Tiang Lampu
programme.desc: Nadia, J.P and Ashraf arrived just in time for the solemnisation. After the mishap, Sally is determined to attend the wedding. programme.desc: When Qaisara goes missing, a desperate Azizi turns to Farouk for financial help. Meanwhile, Leo and Tan Sri Iskandar continue searching for both Azizi and Qaisara's whereabouts.

programme.title: Wanita Syurga
programme.desc: Ardini is heartbroken after receiving a troubling image from Farah and confronts Amar, seeking answers. Meanwhile, Firdaus, furious over his sister's mistreatment, confronts Amar, only to be told to examine his own behaviour.

programme.title: Danny
programme.desc: Sarah meets Liana for the first time. Liana gives her assurance that she habours no feelings towards Danny. programme.title: Jalan Ampas

programme.title: Rahasia Dan Cinta
programme.desc: Dwita, the daughter of a prominent entrepreneur finds herself caught in an arranged marriage with Greg - a match orchestrated by their fathers to merge their companies. Aware that Dwita would likely resist this plan, her father assigns her a personal bodyguard, Debu, to keep her in line. As Dwita, Greg and Deby embark on this unexpected journey together, a series of challenges and complications arise, turning Dwita's life upside down.

programme.title: Konichiwa Superlawak
programme.desc: A comedy reality travel show featuring the members of Superlawak FC as they embark on a surprise trip to Japan for two weeks. Unaware of their destination, the comedians only discover they're heading to Japan upon arriving at the airport. Their mission to play two friendly football matches while immersing themselves in Japanese culture.

programme.title: Remuk
programme.desc: Cik Mun apologizes, Malik seeks forgiveness, but Ziana leaves to protect her mental health. Idris learns Jamilah's deceit. Khairul reconnects with Liza, while Noor and Melissa begin a fragile reunion, caring for Samad in his final months.

programme.title: Papa Ricky
